name: French Onion Soup (Crock Pot)
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a large frying pan, slowly saute the onions in butter until limp and glazed.
2. Transfer the onions to the crock pot.
3. Add white wine, beef stock, sherry, Worcestershire sauce, and garlic to the crock pot.
4. Cover and cook on low (200°F) for 6 to 8 hours.
5. Place French bread on a baking sheet. Sprinkle with cheese.
6. Place under preheated broiler until the cheese is lightly toasted.
7. To serve, ladle soup into a bowl. Float a slice of toasted French bread on top.
